description: Rules for selecting script segments and assigning timeline treatments. This is separate from visual routing so S/B handling does not live in Python.

cognitive_roles.visual_purpose: Establish attention and make the viewer care before the explanation starts.
Name the misleading frame so the next segment can correct it.
Make the cognitive turn visible at the exact voiceover moment.
Convert an abstract mechanism into a physical metaphor.
Show what must be checked, accepted, or constrained.
Land the idea and make the takeaway memorable.

expression_pacing.timing_hint: change image exactly at the turn
hold long enough for the metaphor to be read
hold quote card or overlay without metaphorical rewriting
hold as takeaway or transition out

S.meaning: host voiceover; eligible for brand or explainer images

B.image_policy: do not turn B segments into metaphor images unless an explicit visual override says so

inline_override_schema.syntax: <!-- visual: style: explainer-sketch, layout: Third Path, labels: A|B|C, cognitive_role: turning_point, pace: turn -->
